description.plain: A portable carpet and upholstery cleaner with powerful suction, specialized tools, and odor-fighting power for quick, effective pet mess removal.

unique_selling_points: Combines powerful suction, dual tank system, and Oxy formula for permanent stain and odor removal on the go.
metadata.top_features:
Powerful suction removes large spills and stains for deep cleaning results
Dual tank system with 40 oz capacity allows for extended cleaning sessions
7 inch WidePath tool and TightSpot tool reach and clean hard-to-access areas
Hose Rinse Tool flushes debris to keep the machine clean for the next use
Oxy formula adds 25% odor-fighting power for lasting freshness

media.alt_text: CleanSlate Pet Carpet & Upholstery Spot Cleaner

variants.title: CleanSlate Pet Carpet & Upholstery Spot Cleaner

description.plain: The CleanSlate Pet Carpet & Upholstery Spot Cleaner combines powerful suction, versatile tools, and the performance of the Oxy formula to permanently remove stains and messes. With our 7"" WidePath Tool for large areas like stairs and the TightSpot Tool for crevices and tough to reach areas, you'll have the flexibility you need to clean messes of any size. Quickly remove spills and stains on the go thanks to a light, portable design and a long cord so you can easily move between areas. And with the Hose Rinse tool, your machine stays clean and ready for the next mess.

media.alt_text: CleanSlate Pet Carpet & Upholstery Spot Cleaner

variants.title: Hoover® CleanSlate Pet Carpet & Upholstery Spot Deep Cleaner

description.plain: Description Similar to BISSELL Little Green ProHeat Pet The CleanSlate Pet Carpet & Upholstery Spot Cleaner combines powerful suction, versatile tools, and the performance of the Oxy formula to permanently remove stains and messes. With our 7"" WidePath Tool for large areas like stairs and the TightSpot Tool for crevices and tough to reach areas, you'll have the flexibility you need to clean messes of any size. Quickly remove spills and stains on the go thanks to a light, portable design and a long cord so you can easily move between areas. And with the Hose Rinse tool, your machine stays clean and ready for the next mess. Features Clean tough messes like mud, wine, pet messes and more. Hose Rinse Tool flushes left behind dirt & debris Clean farther with the 40oz. Dual Tank System Tackles stairs & larger messes in fewer passes with the 7” WidePath Tool Tight Spot Tool for corners, baseboards, & tough to reach areas Add a 25% boost of odor-fighting power with the Clean Complements™ Pet Odor Eliminator. Backed by a 2-Year Limited Warranty CleanSlate has been awarded Best cleaner for pet messes by Better Homes & Gardens in the 2022 Clean House Awards Powerful suction for larger spots & stains Tools for every mess with the 7” WidePath Tool and TightSpot Tool Permanently remove pet stains & eliminate odours with the included Oxy Concentrate Quickly remove spills when they happen

description.plain: The new & improved Hoover® PowerDash™ Pet Compact Carpet Cleaner is the most powerful compact carpet cleaner* designed for convenient and effortless cleaning anywhere in your home. The lightweight, grab & go portability makes cleaning from room to room easy while the stronger suction helps you target deep embedded stains. Our Heatforce™ Technology also assists with dry time so you can get back on your carpets faster. With even greater efficiency and powerful cleaning performance, the PowerDash™ Pet Compact Carpet Cleaner is perfect for tackling any pet mess with ease.

media.alt_text: Powerscrub XL Pet Carpet Cleaner

description.plain: The Hoover PowerScrub XL+ Carpet Cleaner powerfully tackles deep, set-in stains and renews your carpets for a complete, whole home clean. Easily remove stains with the combined power of the five counter-rotating SpinScrub brushes and HeatForce faster drying. Our TruMax recovery tank helps you clean more without stopping frequently to empty and refill. Plus, PowerScrub XL comes with versatile tools to target stubborn messes beyond your carpets.

media.alt_text: Powerscrub XL Pet Carpet Cleaner

variants.title: Hoover PowerScrub XL Pet Carpet Cleaner Machine for Carpet and Upholstery, Deep Cleaning Shampooer Machine with Multi-Purpose Tools, Powerful Suction, Pair with Hoover Cleaner Solution

description.plain: About This THE COMPLETE CLEAN COMBO: The Hoover PowerScrub XL Pet Carpet Cleaning Machine combines five counter-rotating SpinScrub brushes and HeatForce faster drying to lift and remove the toughest stains and renew your carpets from the inside out. VERSATILE TOOLS: Deep cleaning goes beyond just the floor. PowerScrub XL Pet Carpet Cleaners come with a pet tool for stubborn pet messes, and an upholstery tool that scrubs and lifts on fabrics and furniture. MORE WAYS TO CLEAN: Cover more ground with fewer stops to empty the tank with our patented TruMAX recovery tank technology. To refresh a smaller area with a faster clean and dry, try Quick Clean mode. AUTO MIX: This Hoover carpet cleaner machine has an Auto Mix feature that precisely mixes and dispenses solution for optimal carpet washing. Package includes upholstery tool, pet tool, storage bag, nozzle cleanout tool, 8 ft. hose, 14-ct of Clean Packs. PAIR WITH HOOVER CLEANING SOLUTION: For a bright, refreshed home, use the PowerScrub XL with a Hoover carpet shampoo solution. Tackle pet messes with our Pet formula or clean everyday stains with our Everyday solutions. Overview Brand : Hoover Color : Black Item Weight : 12.2 Pounds Style : PowerScrub XL Pet & Paws and Claws Pods Model Name : PowerScrub XL Pet and Pods Bundle

media.alt_text: Carpet Cleaner - Gallon

description.plain: Powerful citrus cleaning ability. Carpet Cleaner is the ultimate carpet and upholstery cleanser. It’s natural citrus solvent make cleaning your carpet, floor mats, and upholstery a breeze. Unlike other carpet cleansers and all-purpose cleaners, our Carpet Cleaner doesn’t leave behind any residue or chemical like odors. Your interior will be plush, rejuvenated, and smell refreshing. Before and after using a brush and towel method only! Product Highlights: Concentrated formula makes a minimum of (3) GALLONS of ready-to-use product! Powerful citrus based fabric cleaner. Designed with low foaming aspects to ensure safe cleaning when using with a carpet extractor. Brightens fabric. Leaves behind zero residue that can cause re-soiling. Citrus based for strong, effective cleaning. Concentrated formula makes 5 gallons of cleaner. Compatible with carpet extractors. Works awesome on carpet stains at home also! PRO TIPS: Shine Supply bottle displays easy to read dilution marks Fill with product to the desired dilution mark and then fill with water to the 32 oz mark on the neck of the spray bottle. Dilute 4:1 with water for general light/medium duty cleaning. Dilute 3:1 with water for heavy duty cleaning. Spray directly on area to be cleaned, scrub with our Multi-purpose brush, allow product to activate for 3-5 minutes and then towel up using a microfiber towel.

media.alt_text: Shark CarpetXpert Deep Carpet Cleaner with Built-In StainStriker

variants.title: Shark CarpetXpert Deep Carpet Cleaner with Built-In StainStriker

description.plain: Strike through stains. Eliminate odours. Bring carpets back to life. Introducing the Shark CarpetXpert Deep Carpet Cleaner with StainStriker, combining a powerful deep carpet cleaner with a built-in stain and spot cleaner for supercharged stain elimination. Deep carpet cleaner Built on decades of cleaning innovations, experience Shark’s powerful suction and floor cleaning expertise – now enhanced with carpet washing and stain removal technology. CarpetXpert delivers an 8x deeper clean than a regular vacuum* – the high-pressure spray penetrates deep into carpet fibres and evenly distributes a dual-action cleaning solution, without oversaturating your carpet, removing layers of dirt and grime. The high-speed brush-roll maintains contact with your carpet at every turn – 6 rows of uninterrupted bristles leave no cleaning gaps where dirt may be missed. Fast dry time Shark’s powerful suction extracts dirt and liquid for fast drying, leaving carpets clean and revived, and instantly eliminating odours. Finish your clean with Dry Only mode to dry with suction, without dispensing water or cleaning solution. Built-in StainStriker spot remover Instantly eliminate tough stains anywhere in your home with the built-in StainStriker spot cleaner, for the best stubborn stain removal**. With a long-reach, flexible hose and interchangeable attachments, it’s perfect for tackling stains on pet beds, rugs, carpets, stairs, sofas, upholstery, car interiors and more. 20x more stain-striking power*** No need to pre-treat stains with Shark’s dual-activated cleaning solution. Two bespoke formulas mix and activate inside the handheld StainStriker tool to double down on stains and odours: CarpetXpert Deep Clean Pro formula removes layers of ground-in dirt and grime. StainStriker Oxy Multiplier formula lifts and extracts stubborn stains and odours, unleashing the power of OXY to eliminate tough stains. These two cleaning solutions mix and activate inside the handheld stain eliminator as you clean, targeting and removing even the toughest stains. Strike through pet stains, odours, embedded mud and dirt, spilled red wine or coffee, and more. Your CarpetXpert includes a starter pack of each cleaning solution. Need a top-up? CarpetXpert and StainStriker cleaning solution refills are available to buy directly from Shark here. Clean anywhere Your StainStriker goes wherever stains go. Reach anywhere with the long-reach, flexible hose and handheld cleaning attachments: Pet Stain Trapping Tool Purposefully designed for pet owners, this tool collects hair, debris and dirty liquid in a separate compartment for ultimate convenience and hygienic emptying, stopping larger debris and solids from entering the hose and main unit. Large Tough Stain Tool Quickly clean large areas like stairs, sofas or mattresses with this wide scrubbing tool. Tough Stain Reversible Bristle Tool Strike through everyday dirt, spots and stains with this versatile tool, featuring multi-purpose reversible bristles for different surfaces. Integrated Crevice Tool Perfect for cleaning hard-to-reach places such as in between sofa cushions, car seats or around pet beds. Hose-Cleaning Tool Cleaning the extendable hose from the inside, this handy tool makes it easy to keep your StainStriker clean after each use. It’s easy to empty the dirty water tank and clean the attachments, while an LED guide indicates which mode you are in. 5-year guarantee Clean with confidence – this Shark CarpetXpert with Built-In StainStriker is covered by a 5-year guarantee for your peace of mind (upon registration with Shark, UK & ROI only) Please note, this product is not suitable for use on wool carpets. Check the product instructions for further guidance. Always perform a patch test prior to using.

variants.title: Hoover Oxy Pet Carpet Cleaner 50 oz.

description.plain: The Oxy Pet Carpet Cleaner is Hoover's best formula to permanently eliminate pet stains and odor from urine. This enzymatic formula powerfully breaks down organic particles including ones from pet messes, and neutralizes stubborn odors– you know the ones. It even keeps working after you've finished cleaning so you know your carpets are clean to the core! Oxy technology quickly and effectively removes both old and new stains and odors for a clean that lasts. Leaves your home clean and smelling fresh so you and your pets can relax and enjoy.

media.alt_text: Hoover SmartWash+ Automatic Carpet Cleaner

description.plain: The Hoover SmartWash+ Automatic Carpet Cleaner eliminates the guesswork with Automatic Cleaning Technology that makes carpet cleaning as easy as vacuuming. Wash carpet by simply pushing forward to clean and pulling back to dry. No multiple buttons. No solution measuring. No hassle. Just seriously simple & seriously powerful. Remove deep down embedded dirt with FlexForce™ PowerBrushes. Plus, Auto Mix precisely mixes and dispenses the correct amount of solution for optimal cleaning while Auto Dry powerfully extracts water with HeatForce™ for an even faster drying time. POWERFUL PET MESS EXTRACTION: Enjoy powerful cleaning and extraction for everyday messes around the home. AUTOMATIC CLEANING TECHNOLOGY: SmartWash+ automatically senses when to wash and dry as you move, optimizing every clean without the need for a trigger. 35% FASTER DRY TIME: Enjoy fast dry times and get back on your carpets 35% faster than with Bissell Revolution Hydrosteam. CONVERTS TO A SPOT CLEANER: The included 8-foot hose makes it easy to clean stairs, upholstery and other carpet or upholstered surfaces. DRY-ONLY MODE: Enjoy fast-drying carpets with Dry Only Mode and HeatForce drying technology. AUTOMIX TECHNOLOGY: Precisely measures and mixes the perfect amount of solution and clean water with AutoMix Technology to automatically dispense when cleaning. HASSLE-FREE CLEAN-UP: Removable dirty water tank lid, nozzle and brush roll make clean-up easy. WHAT’S INCLUDED: 4 inch 2-in-1 Tool, 8 foot hose, trial sized solution and storage bag.

media.alt_text: Hoover SmartWash+ Automatic Carpet Cleaner

description.plain: Introducing the SmartWash Pet XL, the ultimate solution for hassle-free carpet cleaning! With Automatic Cleaning Technology, this innovative machine automatically senses when to wash and dry. The included Self-Cleaning Tray flushes out hair and debris for easy cleanup, while the Spot Boost Mode unleashes more cleaning power on stubborn stains. Experience fast drying time and the convenience of XL capacity tanks that help make cleaning quick and easy. Plus, it easily converts to a Spot Cleaner with the included 8-foot hose, perfect for tackling stairs and upholstery.

media.alt_text: Power Scrub Deluxe Carpet Cleaner
